sources.title: Li Zehou, “Subjectivity and ‘Subjectality’: A Response”
sources.citation_zh: 李泽厚：〈Subjectivity and ‘Subjectality’: A Response〉，《Philosophy East and West》49卷2期（1999），174—183页；直接引文另据Jana S. Rošker对李泽厚1985年〈关于主体性的补充说明〉的同行评审重构。
sources.citation_en: Li Zehou, “Subjectivity and ‘Subjectality’: A Response,” Philosophy East and West 49.2 (1999): 174–183; direct wording cross-checked through Jana S. Rošker’s peer-reviewed reconstruction of Li’s 1985 supplementary explanation.

sources.title: Chung-ying Cheng, “Confucian Onto-Hermeneutics: Morality and Ontology”
sources.citation_zh: 成中英：〈Confucian Onto-Hermeneutics: Morality and Ontology〉，《Journal of Chinese Philosophy》27卷1期（2000），33—68页，DOI: 10.1111/0301-8121.00003。
sources.citation_en: Chung-ying Cheng, “Confucian Onto-Hermeneutics: Morality and Ontology,” Journal of Chinese Philosophy 27.1 (2000): 33–68, https://doi.org/10.1111/0301-8121.00003.

sources.title: Tu Weiming, “The Ecological Turn in New Confucian Humanism”
sources.citation_zh: 杜维明：〈The Ecological Turn in New Confucian Humanism: Implications for China and the World〉，《Daedalus》130卷4期（2001），243—264页。
sources.citation_en: Tu Weiming, “The Ecological Turn in New Confucian Humanism: Implications for China and the World,” Daedalus 130.4 (2001): 243–264.

sources.title: 陈来《中华文明的核心价值》
sources.citation_zh: 陈来：《中华文明的核心价值：国学流变与传统价值观》，北京：生活·读书·新知三联书店，2015年；清华大学校级机构页转引书中命题。
sources.citation_en: Chen Lai, The Core Values of Chinese Civilization (Beijing: SDX Joint Publishing, 2015); thesis quoted on Tsinghua University’s institutional publication page.

sources.title: Robin R. Wang, Yinyang: The Way of Heaven and Earth in Chinese Thought and Culture
sources.citation_zh: Robin R. Wang：《Yinyang: The Way of Heaven and Earth in Chinese Thought and Culture》，纽约：Cambridge University Press，2012年，导论及第2章。
sources.citation_en: Robin R. Wang, Yinyang: The Way of Heaven and Earth in Chinese Thought and Culture (New York: Cambridge University Press, 2012), introduction and chap. 2.

sources.title: Jiang Qing, “The Way of the Humane Authority”
sources.citation_zh: 蒋庆：〈The Way of the Humane Authority: The Theoretical Basis for Confucian Constitutionalism and a Tricameral Parliament〉，载《A Confucian Constitutional Order》，Daniel A. Bell、Ruiping Fan编，Princeton University Press，2013年，第1章。
sources.citation_en: Jiang Qing, “The Way of the Humane Authority,” in A Confucian Constitutional Order, ed. Daniel A. Bell and Ruiping Fan (Princeton University Press, 2013), chap. 1.

sources.title: Huang Yong, “Confucian Ethics: Altruistic? Egoistic? Both? Neither?”
sources.citation_zh: 黄勇：〈Confucian Ethics: Altruistic? Egoistic? Both? Neither?〉，《Frontiers of Philosophy in China》13卷2期（2018），217—231页，DOI: 10.3868/s030-007-018-0017-1。
sources.citation_en: Yong Huang, “Confucian Ethics: Altruistic? Egoistic? Both? Neither?” Frontiers of Philosophy in China 13.2 (2018): 217–231, https://doi.org/10.3868/s030-007-018-0017-1.

sources.title: Yang Guorong, Philosophical Horizons: Metaphysical Investigation in Chinese Philosophy
sources.citation_zh: 杨国荣：《Philosophical Horizons: Metaphysical Investigation in Chinese Philosophy》，Paul J. D’Ambrosio编译，Leiden：Brill，2019年，尤其第1章及第7章。
sources.citation_en: Yang Guorong, Philosophical Horizons: Metaphysical Investigation in Chinese Philosophy, ed. and trans. Paul J. D’Ambrosio (Leiden: Brill, 2019), esp. chaps. 1 and 7.

sources.title: Wang Hui, “Depoliticized Politics, From East to West”
sources.citation_zh: 汪晖：〈Depoliticized Politics, From East to West〉，Chris Connery译，《New Left Review》II/41（2006），29—45页。
sources.citation_en: Wang Hui, “Depoliticized Politics, From East to West,” trans. Chris Connery, New Left Review II/41 (2006): 29–45.

sources.title: Zhao Tingyang, “A Political World Philosophy in terms of All-under-heaven”
sources.citation_zh: 赵汀阳：〈A Political World Philosophy in terms of All-under-heaven (Tian-xia)〉，《Diogenes》56卷1期（2009），5—18页，DOI: 10.1177/0392192109102149。
sources.citation_en: Zhao Tingyang, “A Political World Philosophy in terms of All-under-heaven (Tian-xia),” Diogenes 56.1 (2009): 5–18, https://doi.org/10.1177/0392192109102149.

sources.title: Chenyang Li, “Dynamic Harmony”
sources.citation_zh: 李晨阳：〈Dynamic Harmony〉，《Reshaping Confucianism: A Progressive Inquiry》，Oxford University Press，2023年，第1章，27—52页。
sources.citation_en: Chenyang Li, “Dynamic Harmony,” in Reshaping Confucianism: A Progressive Inquiry (Oxford University Press, 2023), chap. 1, 27–52.

sources.title: Tongdong Bai, Against Political Equality: The Confucian Case
sources.citation_zh: 白彤东：《Against Political Equality: The Confucian Case》，Princeton：Princeton University Press，2019年，尤其第3章。
sources.citation_en: Tongdong Bai, Against Political Equality: The Confucian Case (Princeton University Press, 2019), esp. chap. 3.

claims.text_zh: 主体性首先形成于人类群体改造世界的生产实践，并通过历史积淀进入个体的心理结构，而不是孤立个人的任意选择。
claims.text_en: Subjectality is formed first through humanity’s collective productive practice and historically sedimented into individual psychologies, rather than consisting in an isolated individual’s arbitrary choice.
claims.explanation_zh: 李泽厚以“主体性”区别于存在主义式个体选择，把工具使用、社会实践与文化心理积淀连接起来；审美能力也是这一历史塑形的结果。
claims.explanation_en: Li distinguishes subjectality from existentialist individual choice by connecting tool use, social practice, and cultural-psychological sedimentation; aesthetic capacities are products of this historical formation as well.
claims.locator: Philosophy East and West 49.2 (1999), pp. 176–180；并参〈关于主体性的补充说明〉（1985）第15页
claims.excerpt_text: My own primarily deals with productive practice.
claims.attribution_note: 命题依据李泽厚本人1999年回应文；短引语来自其1985年说明并由同行评审研究逐字转引。由于1985年原刊在线不可访问，明确标注交叉来源，不伪装成网页直引。

claims.text_zh: 诠释不是与存在分离的文本技术；理解在本体、知识与道德实践的循环中生成，并反过来转化理解者。
claims.text_en: Interpretation is not a textual technique separate from being; understanding emerges through a circulation of ontology, knowledge, and moral practice and in turn transforms the interpreter.
claims.explanation_zh: 成中英以《易》的生成变化和本体—方法循环扩展西方诠释学，使理解同时具有认识论、本体论和德性修养意义。
claims.explanation_en: Cheng extends Western hermeneutics through Yijing-based generation and a circulation between ontology and method, giving understanding epistemic, ontological, and self-cultivational force.
claims.attribution_note: 规范命题概括整篇论文的系统论证；excerpt仅保留作者题名中的概念组合，不制造无法逐字核对的引语。

claims.text_zh: 儒家人文主义应是“人—宇宙共同体”的：人嵌入天地万物的秩序并承担回应责任，而不是以人类中心主义支配自然。
claims.text_en: Confucian humanism should be anthropocosmic: humans are embedded in the order of Heaven, Earth, and the myriad things and bear responsive responsibility rather than dominating nature anthropocentrically.
claims.explanation_zh: 杜维明以天地人合一重构现代人文主义，把人的尊严与生态责任同时奠基于关系性的宇宙位置。
claims.explanation_en: Tu reconstructs modern humanism through the unity of Heaven, Earth, and humanity, grounding human dignity and ecological responsibility in a relational cosmic position.
claims.excerpt_text: the human is embedded in the cosmic order
claims.work_title: The Ecological Turn in New Confucian Humanism
claims.attribution_note: 作者本人论文；命题不把“anthropocosmic”翻成取消人类特殊责任的自然整体主义。

claims.text_zh: 中华传统价值的突出取向是责任、义务、社群与和谐分别优先于自由、权利、个人与冲突。
claims.text_en: A salient orientation of traditional Chinese values gives priority to responsibility, duty, community, and harmony over freedom, rights, the individual, and conflict respectively.
claims.explanation_zh: 陈来把这些表述定义为文明的比较性“价值偏好”，不是声称自由、权利或个人毫无价值；公开节点必须保留这一限定。
claims.explanation_en: Chen presents these formulations as comparative civilizational preferences, not as claims that freedom, rights, or individuals have no value; the qualification must remain explicit.
claims.locator: 《中华文明的核心价值》导论；清华大学机构页首段
claims.excerpt_text: 责任先于自由，义务先于权利，社群高于个人，和谐高于冲突。
claims.attribution_note: 引文由清华大学机构页明确归于作者新著；解释使用“价值偏好”是陈来本人对比较方法的说明，避免将描述性比较写成政治身份判断。

claims.text_zh: 阴阳不是两个固定且互斥的实体，而是包含相依、互含、交感、互补和转化的关系范式，其互动具有生成新事物的效力。
claims.text_en: Yinyang is not a pair of fixed mutually exclusive substances but a relational paradigm of interdependence, mutual inclusion, resonance, complementarity, and transformation whose interaction is generative.
claims.explanation_zh: Robin Wang将阴阳从简单的二元对立中解放出来，同时指出历史文本中的性别关联不能自动被当作永恒自然等级。
claims.explanation_en: Robin Wang frees yinyang from simple binary opposition while showing that historical gender correlations should not automatically be treated as eternal natural hierarchy.
claims.work_title: Yinyang: The Way of Heaven and Earth in Chinese Thought and Culture
claims.attribution_note: 作者本人著作及Cambridge预览；五类关系与生成论依据导论，性别限定依据全书对历史用法的分析，不把阴阳本质化。

claims.text_zh: 政治权力的正当性不能只来自民意，还必须同时得到超越性道德原则、历史文化连续性和人民认可三方面支持。
claims.text_en: Political legitimacy cannot derive from popular will alone; it must also be supported by transcendent moral principle, historical-cultural continuity, and popular acceptance.
claims.explanation_zh: 蒋庆把三方面分别表述为天、地、人之合法性，并据此提出制度构想；节点只记录正当性论证，不把方案评价为已经可行。
claims.explanation_en: Jiang names these the legitimacy of Heaven, Earth, and the human and builds an institutional proposal upon them; the node records the legitimacy argument without judging the proposal feasible.
claims.locator: A Confucian Constitutional Order, chap. 1, section “Threefold Legitimacy”
claims.excerpt_text: three kinds of legitimacy—that of heaven, earth, and the human
claims.work_title: The Way of the Humane Authority
claims.attribution_note: 作者本人章节；“天、地、人”的现代制度解释为作者方案，不能倒推成《春秋公羊传》已有同一制度设计。

claims.text_zh: 儒家伦理既不能简化为利己主义，也不能简化为牺牲自我的利他主义；成德意味着把他人的福祉纳入与自己同体的关切。
claims.text_en: Confucian ethics is reducible neither to egoism nor to self-sacrificial altruism; becoming virtuous incorporates others’ well-being into concern for a shared body.
claims.explanation_zh: 黄勇认为成德以成就自己为目标，却又必然关心他人；“与人同体”使自利/利他的现代二分不再充分。
claims.explanation_en: Huang argues that self-cultivation aims at one’s own virtue yet necessarily concerns others; becoming one body with others makes the modern egoism/altruism dichotomy inadequate.
claims.locator: Frontiers of Philosophy in China 13.2 (2018), abstract and pp. 226–230
claims.excerpt_text: the Confucian ideal of a virtuous person is to be in one body with others
claims.work_title: Confucian Ethics: Altruistic? Egoistic? Both? Neither?
claims.attribution_note: 作者本人同行评审论文；excerpt来自出版社公开摘要，命题不扩展为对所有儒家文本的唯一解释。

claims.text_zh: 具体形上学不能把存在抽象为脱离人的空洞本体；它要在事实与价值、知识与意义、成己与成物的统一过程中把握真实存在。
claims.text_en: Concrete metaphysics cannot abstract being into an empty ground detached from human life; it approaches authentic being through the unity of fact and value, knowledge and meaning, and self- and world-formation.
claims.explanation_zh: 杨国荣试图在反传统形上学批判之后保留形上追问，同时用人的历史实践限制空洞思辨。
claims.explanation_en: Yang seeks to preserve metaphysical inquiry after critiques of traditional metaphysics while constraining empty speculation through historically situated human practice.
claims.locator: Philosophical Horizons, chap. 1 “Metaphysics and the Metaphysical,” pp. 1–22; chap. 7, pp. 183–210
claims.excerpt_text: the original unity of being and the manifestations of being
claims.attribution_note: 作者本人英译论文集；短语由期刊专题导论对其体系的概括交叉核对，规范命题则依据Brill开放全书相关章节。

claims.text_zh: 去政治化把市场、国家和社会不平等呈现为自然、中立或纯技术过程，从而抹去利益冲突与公众介入政治的空间。
claims.text_en: Depoliticization presents markets, the state, and social inequality as natural, neutral, or merely technical processes, thereby erasing conflicts of interest and spaces for public intervention.
claims.explanation_zh: 汪晖所说的重新政治化，不等于增加权力斗争，而是揭示被自然化的支配关系并恢复理论争论与自主社会行动。
claims.explanation_en: For Wang, repoliticization does not mean more power struggle; it denaturalizes domination and restores theoretical debate and autonomous social action.
claims.locator: New Left Review II/41 (2006), pp. 39–45, especially “State and ideology”
claims.excerpt_text: De-naturalization must be used to combat depoliticization.
claims.work_title: Depoliticized Politics, From East to West
claims.attribution_note: 作者本人文章的英译版；解释区分其规范性的“政治”与日常意义的权力政治，不据学术主张评价作者身份。

claims.text_zh: 全球问题必须以世界整体而非国家间外部关系为基本政治单位，通过可被所有人接受的世界制度转化为真正的“世界内部问题”。
claims.text_en: Global problems require the world as the basic political unit rather than external relations among states, with a universally acceptable world institution turning them into genuinely internal world problems.
claims.explanation_zh: 赵汀阳重构“天下”为新普遍主义，批评只处理国家利益均衡的国际政治；节点不预设其制度方案已经解决权力不对称。
claims.explanation_en: Zhao reconstructs tianxia as neo-universalism and criticizes international politics limited to balancing state interests; the node does not assume his institution already resolves power asymmetry.
claims.excerpt_text: rethink all problems in the world as problems of the world
claims.work_title: A Political World Philosophy in terms of All-under-heaven
claims.attribution_note: 作者本人同行评审论文；使用作者的“neo-universalism”自我定位，不把天下概念等同于任何现行国家政策。

claims.text_zh: 和谐不是消除差异后的同一，而是不同要素通过相互调整、配合与转化生成新整体的动态过程。
claims.text_en: Harmony is not sameness produced by eliminating difference but a dynamic process in which different elements generate new wholes through mutual adjustment, accommodation, collaboration, and transformation.
claims.explanation_zh: 李晨阳把动态和谐从宇宙生成延伸到人格、社会和人与自然关系，并明确区分和谐与顺从或压制冲突。
claims.explanation_en: Li extends dynamic harmony from cosmogony to persons, society, and human-nature relations, explicitly distinguishing harmony from conformity or suppressed conflict.
claims.locator: Reshaping Confucianism, chap. 1, pp. 27–52; Oxford Academic abstract
claims.excerpt_text: different elements join hands to generate new wholes through mutual adjustment
claims.attribution_note: 作者本人OUP章节；excerpt来自出版社公开摘要，节点避免将和谐误写为无差别一致。

claims.text_zh: 较好的政体可以结合民主问责与机会平等、儒家贤能政治以及准自由主义的法律和权利保障，而不把政治平等视为唯一最高原则。
claims.text_en: A preferable regime can combine democratic accountability and equal opportunity, Confucian meritocratic elements, and quasi-liberal protections of law and rights without treating political equality as the sole highest principle.
claims.explanation_zh: 白彤东的混合政体论试图保留民主、自由与贤能政治各自的部分优势；节点记录其规范方案，不声称经验上已被证明。
claims.explanation_en: Bai’s hybrid-regime argument seeks to retain selected advantages of democracy, liberty, and meritocracy; the node records a normative proposal, not an empirically proven result.
claims.locator: Against Political Equality, book abstract and chap. 3 “A Confucian Hybrid Regime”
claims.excerpt_text: Confucian-inspired meritocratic characteristics combined with democratic elements and a quasi-liberal system of laws and rights
claims.work_title: Against Political Equality: The Confucian Case
claims.attribution_note: 作者本人PUP专著；excerpt来自出版社公开摘要。解释保持规范论证与现实政体评价之间的界线。
